# PresentMon runtime

LegionGoControl bundles `../../PresentMon.exe` from Intel/GameTechDev PresentMon
v2.5.1 to collect FPS and frame-presentation timing through ETW without game
injection or RTSS. PresentMon is distributed under the MIT license in
`LICENSE.txt`.

- Upstream: https://github.com/GameTechDev/PresentMon
- Release: https://github.com/GameTechDev/PresentMon/releases/tag/v2.5.1
- SHA-256: `9bec3083069f58f911e6a512f4806db51a27bd096103087bc1d05ef54c80a191`
